title: BlackBerry Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: BlackBerry stock analysis shows strong growth potential with multiple analyst upgrades following recent earnings beats. Analysts forecast BB's EPS at $0.15 for 2026 and $0.18 for 2027, reflecting expectations for continued profitability improvement. Wall Street consensus shows 1 Buy, 7 Hold, and 0 Sell ratings among 10 analysts, with a median price target of $4.75. The average 12-month price target stands at $6.99, implying 29.44% upside potential from current levels. BlackBerry is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 18.5% and 8.2% per annum respectively. Revenue is forecast to grow 24% per annum on average during the next 3 years, compared to 12% growth forecast for the Software industry. The company's earnings growth rate of 86.86% is expected to beat the US Software Infrastructure industry average of 21.14%. Recent earnings beats and strong guidance have supported analyst optimism about the company's turnaround story.
